---
title : "Figure 9.3"
subtitle : "Neural networks fitting"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function launch_training_relu_nn(X, y, Xtest, ytest, m, batch_size, maxiter, gamma, rng)
    n = size(X, 1)
    d = size(X, 2)
    ntest = size(Xtest, 1)

    w = randn(rng, d, m)
    for j in 1:m
        w[:, j] ./= norm(w[:, j])
    end
    b = rand(rng, 1, m) .* 2.0 .- 1.0
    eta = randn(rng, 1, m) ./ sqrt(m / 2.0)
    eta_bias = 0.0

    for iter in 1:maxiter
        idx = [mod1((iter - 1) * batch_size + j, n) for j in 1:batch_size]
        Xbatch = X[idx, :]
        ybatch = y[idx]

        preact = Xbatch * w .+ b
        hidden = max.(preact, 0.0)
        hiddender = Float64.(preact .> 0.0)

        ypred = hidden * eta' .+ eta_bias
        diff = ypred .- ybatch

        gradeta = diff' * hidden
        gradb = diff' * (hiddender .* eta)
        gradw = Xbatch' * (diff .* (hiddender .* eta))

        w -= (gamma / batch_size) * gradw
        b -= (gamma / batch_size) * gradb
        eta -= (gamma / batch_size) * gradeta
    end
    return w, b, eta, eta_bias
end

function get_target(X, idata)
    if idata == 1
        return sin.(2.0 * pi * X)
    elseif idata == 2
        return sign.(sin.(2.0 * pi * X))
    elseif idata == 3
        return (max.(X ./ 2.0, 0.0) .- 0.25) .* 4.0
    else
        return 4.0 .* abs.(X .+ 1.0 .- 0.25 .- floor.(X .+ 1.0 .- 0.25) .- 0.5) .- 1.0
    end
end
```

```{julia}
rng = MersenneTwister(1)
n = 128
ntest = 1024
maxiter = 400_000
batch_size = 16
gamma = 0.005
std_noise = 0.2

X = rand(rng, n, 1) .* 2.0 .- 1.0
Xtest = collect(0:ntest-1) ./ (ntest - 1) .* 2.0 .- 1.0

# Store plots data
plot_data = Dict()

for idata in 1:4
    y = get_target(X, idata) .+ std_noise * randn(rng, n)
    ytest = get_target(Xtest, idata)

    for m in [5, 32, 100]
        w, b, eta, eta_bias = launch_training_relu_nn(
            X, y, Xtest, ytest, m, batch_size, maxiter, gamma, rng
        )
        hidden_test = max.(Xtest * w .+ b, 0.0)
        ypred_test = hidden_test * eta' .+ eta_bias

        plot_data[(idata, m)] = (X=X[:, 1], y=y, Xtest=Xtest, ytest=ytest, ypred=ypred_test[:, 1])
    end
end
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(1600, 1200), fontsize=18)
ms = [5, 32, 100]

for (im, m) in enumerate(ms)
    for idata in 1:4
        data = plot_data[(idata, m)]
        ax = Axis(fig[im, idata], xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="m = $m", limits=((-1, 1), (-1.5, 2.0)))

        lines!(ax, data.Xtest, data.ytest, color=red, linewidth=2, label="target")
        lines!(ax, data.Xtest, data.ypred, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="prediction")
        scatter!(ax, data.X, data.y, color=:black, marker=:x, markersize=6)

        axislegend(ax, position=:rt)
    end
end

fig
```
